lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: A fair day, traveller. Would you like to see my wares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to ask you about magic crossbows.

lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: Ahh crossbows. Not exactly what I'd call skilled ranging, but I guess dwarven engineering is good, what did you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The dwarves don't work with magic logs, I'm wondering if you know how to make a crossbow out of them?

lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: As it happens, a recent discovery of dragon limbs has allowed the creation of such a crossbow.

lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: A fair day, traveller. Would you like to see my wares?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to ask you about magic crossbows.

lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: Ahh crossbows. Not exactly what I'd call skilled ranging, but I guess dwarven engineering is good, what did you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The dwarves don't work with magic logs, I'm wondering if you know how to make a crossbow out of them?

lines.speaker: Bow and Arrow salesman
lines.text: I don't... however I will look into it when I get spare time, for now you'll have to stick with the dwarven way of doing things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, perhaps one day in the future I'll get to make magic crossbows!
